answer:
First, convert each person’s hourly wage to US dollars:  
Navin: 160 rupee ÷ 32.35 ≈ 4.945 USD/hour  
Luka: 25 kuna ÷ 5.18 ≈ 4.826 USD/hour  
Ian: 34 pula ÷ 6.95 ≈ 4.892 USD/hour  

After 8 hours:  
Navin ≈ 39.56 USD, Luka ≈ 38.61 USD, Ian ≈ 39.14 USD.  

Thus, Navin earns the most.

\boxed{Navin}
